name: gacha
description: Fresh-data investment research agent harness for discovery, selection, entry, and exit decisions.

interface.longDescription: gacha helps users route investment research workflows through a local OpenCode runtime. It requires fresh web data, provenance, risk review, and human final decision-making.
defaultPrompt: gacha discover: find current investment opportunities
gacha entry: analyze whether a target is buyable now
gacha exit: review sell and stop-loss conditions
